response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for 'Zankyo Sanka'. The video segment begins with a long dialogue section where the Hololive members introduce the 'Foot Massage Karaoke Battle' game, followed by IRyS's performance. I am transcribing both the dialogue and the song lyrics, utilizing on-screen text as the primary fallback for the singing portion and technical terms. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal activity, and the English translation maintains semantic continuity during the chaotic singing performance.

subtitles.original: So far, are you guys having a good time?
subtitles.english: So far, are you guys having a good time?

subtitles.original: Don't forget to share your comments using the hashtag shown at the top right of the screen!
subtitles.english: Don't forget to share your comments using the hashtag shown at the top right of the screen!

subtitles.original: #Promise2U
subtitles.english: #Promise2U

subtitles.original: This way!
subtitles.english: This way!

subtitles.original: #Promise2U!
subtitles.english: #Promise2U!

subtitles.original: Alright, we're currently at the Promise Hideout!
subtitles.english: Alright, we're currently at the Promise Hideout!

subtitles.original: Over there!
subtitles.english: Over there!

subtitles.original: Whoa! Oh my god, that is huge!
subtitles.english: Whoa! Oh my god, that is huge!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, it's so pretty!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, it's so pretty!

subtitles.original: Don't die! Don't die!
subtitles.english: Don't die! Don't die!

subtitles.original: It's so big. Hello everyone!
subtitles.english: It's so big. Hello everyone!

subtitles.original: Is there a helicopter flying out there taking videos of us?
subtitles.english: Is there a helicopter flying out there taking videos of us?

subtitles.original: Now we have it. Now we do.
subtitles.english: Now we have it. Now we do.

subtitles.original: And now that we also have such a fancy stage on the rooftop as well...
subtitles.english: And now that we also have such a fancy stage on the rooftop as well...

subtitles.original: ...and everything, let's turn things up with some fun variety games!
subtitles.english: ...and everything, let's turn things up with some fun variety games!

subtitles.original: Variety games!
subtitles.english: Variety games!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I bet you guys are probably feeling a bit tired after that intense first half of this live, right?
subtitles.english: Yeah, I bet you guys are probably feeling a bit tired after that intense first half of this live, right?

subtitles.original: I'm good! I'm there! I'm alive, I'm standing! We're good!
subtitles.english: I'm good! I'm there! I'm alive, I'm standing! We're good!

subtitles.original: You guys seem a little tired.
subtitles.english: You guys seem a little tired.

subtitles.original: Yeah, to help you recover from that fatigue and tiredness, I've prepared the perfect segment for you guys.
subtitles.english: Yeah, to help you recover from that fatigue and tiredness, I've prepared the perfect segment for you guys.

subtitles.original: Yes, it's called: Pleasure or Pain? Promise Foot Massage Karaoke Battle!
subtitles.english: Yes, it's called: Pleasure or Pain? Promise Foot Massage Karaoke Battle!

subtitles.original: Wait, what does that mean?
subtitles.english: Wait, what does that mean?

subtitles.original: Each of us will sing one chorus from two songs that we're confident in!
subtitles.english: Each of us will sing one chorus from two songs that we're confident in!

subtitles.original: Yes, we'll use the karaoke machine's scoring system, and the person with the highest combined score will win!
subtitles.english: Yes, we'll use the karaoke machine's scoring system, and the person with the highest combined score will win!

subtitles.original: There's also a twist!
subtitles.english: There's also a twist!

subtitles.original: Yes, we will be singing while receiving foot massages!
subtitles.english: Yes, we will be singing while receiving foot massages!

subtitles.original: And how that will affect our performance or score, well, we'll see and find out together right here!
subtitles.english: And how that will affect our performance or score, well, we'll see and find out together right here!

subtitles.original: Yes, and there will be a punishment for the losers as well, of course.
subtitles.english: Yes, and there will be a punishment for the losers as well, of course.

subtitles.original: The losers will have to drink this super sour geki-suppa drink!
subtitles.english: The losers will have to drink this super sour geki-suppa drink!

subtitles.original: Now let me show you the key item that could make or break this battle.
subtitles.english: Now let me show you the key item that could make or break this battle.

subtitles.original: Here's what we'll use for the first round! Ja-jang!
subtitles.english: Here's what we'll use for the first round! Ja-jang!

subtitles.original: It's a foot reflexology mat! I've never stepped on one of these before.
subtitles.english: It's a foot reflexology mat! I've never stepped on one of these before.

subtitles.original: I have. It's not pleasant. It's not fun.
subtitles.english: I have. It's not pleasant. It's not fun.

subtitles.original: Wait, so you want us to... wait, we're singing while we're on this?
subtitles.english: Wait, so you want us to... wait, we're singing while we're on this?

subtitles.original: You're gonna sound amazing. We're all gonna sound amazing singing on this.
subtitles.english: You're gonna sound amazing. We're all gonna sound amazing singing on this.

subtitles.original: So, who's brave enough to go first?
subtitles.english: So, who's brave enough to go first?

subtitles.original: Senpai! Senpai! Senpai!
subtitles.english: Senpai! Senpai! Senpai!

subtitles.original: You look so beautiful today.
subtitles.english: You look so beautiful today.

subtitles.original: I feel like as a senpai you should show us how it's done, right?
subtitles.english: I feel like as a senpai you should show us how it's done, right?

subtitles.original: Fine! I'll go first!
subtitles.english: Fine! I'll go first!

subtitles.original: Alright IRyS, which song are you gonna sing?
subtitles.english: Alright IRyS, which song are you gonna sing?

subtitles.original: I am going to sing Zankyo Sanka.
subtitles.english: I am going to sing Zankyo Sanka.

subtitles.original: If you're ready! Get on the mat!
subtitles.english: If you're ready! Get on the mat!

subtitles.original: Okay... I get on the mat.
subtitles.english: Okay... I get on the mat.

subtitles.original: Ow! It hurts! Ow! I'm on it!
subtitles.english: Ow! It hurts! Ow! I'm on it!

subtitles.original: いって！始まるよ！
subtitles.english: Ow! It's starting!

subtitles.original: 誰が袖に咲く幻花
subtitles.english: A phantom flower blooming on someone's sleeve

subtitles.original: ただそこに藍を落とした
subtitles.english: I simply dropped indigo there

subtitles.original: 派手に色を溶かす夜に
subtitles.english: In a night that vividly melts colors

subtitles.original: 銀朱の月を添えて
subtitles.english: Adding a cinnabar moon

subtitles.original: 転がるように風を切って
subtitles.english: Cutting through the wind as if rolling

subtitles.original: 躓くごとに強くなった
subtitles.english: Growing stronger with every stumble

subtitles.original: 光も痛みも怒りも全部
subtitles.english: Embracing everything, the light, the pain, the anger

subtitles.original: 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: I'll embrace it all

subtitles.original: 選ばれなければ選べばいい
subtitles.english: If you aren't chosen, you can just choose

subtitles.original: 声よ響け夜のその向こうへ
subtitles.english: Let my voice resonate beyond the night

subtitles.original: 涙で滲んでいた
subtitles.english: It was blurred by tears

subtitles.original: あんなに遠くの景色まで
subtitles.english: Resonate to that distant landscape

subtitles.original: 響き渡れ
subtitles.english: Resonate out

subtitles.original: 何を奏でて？誰に届けたくて？
subtitles.english: What are you playing? Who do you want to reach?

subtitles.original: 不確かなままでいい
subtitles.english: It's fine to be uncertain

subtitles.original: どんなに長い葛藤も
subtitles.english: No matter how long the struggle

subtitles.original: どんなに暗い感情も
subtitles.english: No matter how dark the emotions

subtitles.original: 歌と散れ
subtitles.english: Scatter with the song

subtitles.original: 残響
subtitles.english: Lingering echoes
